CustomField.description: Boolean yields true or false if any of the SAI fields say Turnback or Rejected
CustomField.formula: And ( OR( CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Strategic_Services__c),"Turnback"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Strategic_Services__c),"Rejected"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Disease_Research__c),"Turnback"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Disease_Research__c),"Rejected"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Drug_Discovery__c),"Turnback"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Drug_Discovery__c),"Rejected"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Pre_Clinical_Studies__c),"Turnback"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Pre_Clinical_Studies__c),"Rejected"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Clinical_Studies__c),"Turnback"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Clinical_Studies__c),"Rejected"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_QA_QC_Drug_Manufacturing_Process__c),"Turnback"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_QA_QC_Drug_Manufacturing_Process__c),"Rejected") ) )
CustomField.label: Is TurnBack or Rejected 1
